content: Pandemic preparedness actions: (1) Surveillance—strengthen event-based and indicator-based systems, genomic sequencing networks; (2) Laboratory—expand PCR capacity, establish sentinel testing sites, ensure reagent supply chains; (3) Workforce—train epidemiologists, laboratorians, contact tracers, maintain surge rosters; (4) Healthcare capacity—stockpile PPE, ventilators, therapeutics; plan facility expansion; (5) Vaccines/therapeutics—advance purchase agreements, technology transfer platforms, clinical trial networks; (6) Risk communication—pre-drafted messages, social media monitoring, combat misinformation; (7) Coordination—incident management systems, multi-sectoral task forces, international collaboration. Regular exercises test and refine plans.
source: WHO Pandemic Influenza Preparedness Framework, CDC Public Health Emergency Preparedness capabilities
